no_blindfold_to_remove: You don't have a blindfold to remove.
cant_remove_dead: You cannot remove a blindfold while dead or in last stand.
cant_remove_handcuffed: You cannot remove a blindfold while handcuffed.
cant_apply_dead: You cannot apply a blindfold while dead or in last stand.
cant_apply_handcuffed: You cannot apply a blindfold while handcuffed.
admin_force_blindfold: Force a player to put on a blindfold
admin_remove_blindfold: Force a player to remove their blindfold
admin_remove_blindfold_help: Player ID to remove blindfold from
admin_check_blindfold_state: Check if a player is blindfolded
admin_check_blindfold_state_help: Player ID to check blindfold status
